testcase.name: Stock and Price are valid numbers
Status code is 201 Created

failure.message: expected response to have status code 201 but got 401

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Order Book. Test description: Status code is 201 Created. Error message: expected response to have status code 201 but got 401. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 201 but got 401 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:5).

testcase.name: Response body has the correct structure
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Order Book. Test description: Response body has the correct structure. Error message: expected { Object (error) } to have property 'created'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected { Object (error) } to have property 'created' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:5).

testcase.name: Order confirmation is true
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Order Book. Test description: Order confirmation is true. Error message: expected undefined to be true. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to be true at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:5).

testcase.name: OrderID is a valid string

failure.message: expected undefined to be a string

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Order Book. Test description: OrderID is a valid string. Error message: expected undefined to be a string. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to be a string at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:4:5).

testcase.name: Status code is 200

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 401

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Get All Orders. testcase.name: Response is an array

failure.message: expected { Object (error) } to be an array

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Get All Orders. Test description: Response is an array. Error message: expected { Object (error) } to be an array. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected { Object (error) } to be an array at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:6).

testcase.name: Each order has required fields
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Get All Orders. Test description: Each order has required fields. Error message: response.forEach is not a function. Stacktrace: TypeError: response.forEach is not a function at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:6).

testcase.name: Newly created order is present in the list
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Get All Orders. Test description: Newly created order is present in the list. Error message: response.find is not a function. Stacktrace: TypeError: response.find is not a function at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:4:6).

testcase.name: Status code is 200

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 401

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Get an Order. testcase.name: Check order required fields
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Get an Order. Test description: Check order required fields. Error message: expected { Object (error) } to have property 'id'. testcase.name: Status code is 204
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Update Order. Test description: Status code is 204. Error message: expected 401 to equal 204. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected 401 to equal 204 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:8).

testcase.name: Status code is 204

failure.message: expected response to have status code 204 but got 401

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 04e08813-4c8c-4e4d-905f-302ca911fa1f. Collection name: Postman Tutorial. Request name: Simple-Books / Delete Order.
